query:
UPDATE "ob-poc".outstanding_requests
            SET status = 'WAIVED',
                fulfilled_at = NOW(),
                fulfillment_type = 'WAIVER',
                fulfillment_notes = $2,
                fulfilled_by_user_id = $3
            WHERE request_id = $1 AND status = 'PENDING'
            RETURNING workstream_id, blocks_subject
